rationale: Codebase-pin lens: every file/symbol/line claim verified at reviewed SHA 655052a2. All six fence-scan sites match exact names+lines: approve/plan.go updatePlanApproval :207-268 + writeBeadIDsToFrontmatter :686-745, approve/spec.go splitFrontmatter :270-288, approve/impl.go readPlanBeadIDs :440-466, contextpack/budgeter.go parseCitedADRs :581-608 + extractPlanBeadSection frontmatter-strip :614-631, validate/plan.go parsePlanFrontmatter :266-303. state.go readSpecApprovalStatus :189-215 + callers :70 (==APPROVED) / :111 (!=APPROVED) + test state_test.go:200 all present. validate.SpecStatus exists and is LIVE at next/mode.go:136 via EqualFold(...,"Approved") — the exact pattern R6 proposes. frontmatter.Parse TrimRight(line,"\r\n")=="---" confirmed (frontmatter.go:83/93-94). trace.Event.MarshalJSON :52-56 = json.Marshal(Alias(e)), dead. Import graph exact: cmd/mindspec+instruct=workflow, bead=execution consumer; recording/otel claim verified FALSE. doctor manifestResolvesAny :121-153 + walkExclusions + WalkDir, docsync checkUnclaimedSource load-once pattern (:220-230), all confirmed. OWNERSHIP has neither claim yet but owns sibling tooling paths. .golangci carve-outs: brownfield+isNeighbor targets absent (inert), findRoot live at beads.go:53. No spec defects.
findings: VERIFIED all six fence-scan sites at claimed names+lines: updatePlanApproval :207 (ends 268), writeBeadIDsToFrontmatter :686 (ends 745), splitFrontmatter :270 (ends 288), readPlanBeadIDs :440 (ends 466), parseCitedADRs :581 (ends 608), extractPlanBeadSection :614 (frontmatter-strip block ends ~631, section-scan begins 633 — spec's :614-631 correctly scopes the strip portion), parsePlanFrontmatter :266 (ends 303).

VERIFIED validate/state.go readSpecApprovalStatus at :189; callers at :70 (== "APPROVED") and :111 (!= "APPROVED"); test TestReadSpecApprovalStatus at :182 calls readSpecApprovalStatus at line 200 exactly as spec claims.

VERIFIED validate.SpecStatus is live: defined internal/validate/frontmatter.go:22, called at internal/next/mode.go:136 with strings.EqualFold(validate.SpecStatus(root, specID), "Approved") — mirrors R6's proposed replacement approach. NOTE: spec.md pins no file for SpecStatus; the BRIEF's parenthetical 'internal/validate/spec.go' is off (actual file is frontmatter.go), but this is a BRIEF typo, not a spec defect.

VERIFIED frontmatter.Parse fence semantics: strings.TrimRight(string(lines[0]), "\r\n") != "---" (frontmatter.go:83) and stripped := strings.TrimRight(string(line), "\r\n"); stripped == "---" (:93-94) — confirms the deliberate-tightening claim in R5 vs hand-rolled TrimSpace copies.
VERIFIED trace.Event.MarshalJSON at event.go:52-56 (comment :52, func :53, type Alias Event :54, return json.Marshal(Alias(e)) :55, } :56) — dead aliased no-op as claimed.

VERIFIED import graph: internal/trace non-test importers are cmd/mindspec/root.go + cmd/mindspec/trace.go (workflow), internal/instruct/run.go (workflow), internal/bead/bdcli.go (execution consumer) — 'two of three importers workflow' is accurate. Falsified review's claim: internal/recording imports neither trace nor otel; internal/otel does not import trace. Grill resolution is correct.

VERIFIED doctor/ownership.go manifestResolvesAny :121 (ends ~152), filepath.WalkDir at :128, walkExclusions var :20 referenced at :141; docsync.go checkUnclaimedSource func at :204 with load-once-per-domain pattern (states []domainState, loadOwnershipForRef once per domain) in the :220-230 body region the spec cites as the R7 model. checkInternalPackages :459 and normalizeImpactedDomains :72 confirmed.

VERIFIED OWNERSHIP.yaml: internal/trace and .golangci.yml NOT yet claimed (as R1 expects); sibling repo-tooling paths cmd/**, plugins/mindspec/**, .claude/skills/**, scripts/bd-jsonl-merge-driver.sh ARE workflow-owned, supporting the '.golangci claim is natural/minimal' rationale.

VERIFIED .golangci.yml has four unparam carve-outs: brownfield/plan.go :77, isNeighbor :84, findRoot :88, validateReviewMode :92. internal/brownfield package ABSENT and contextpack isNeighbor ABSENT (both R3 removals verifiably inert); findRoot LIVE at internal/next/beads.go:53 (R3 defer justified); validateReviewMode LIVE at internal/validate/state.go:175 (kept, correct).

VERIFIED all named AC test functions (TestWorkflowOwnsTraceAndGolangci, TestEventNDJSONGolden, TestApprovalWriteByteIdentical, TestSpecApprovalStatusFromFrontmatter, TestOwnershipCheckWalksTreeOnce) do NOT yet exist — consistent with pre-implementation spec gate.

OBSERVATION (non-blocking, planning concern not a pin defect): BRIEF flags 107 also touches internal/validate/plan.go. Spec's plan.go edit is the parsePlanFrontmatter migration; any overlap with 107 is a merge-conflict/sequencing matter the spec already acknowledges (base predates 107) and defers findRoot accordingly. Outside codebase-pin scope; raised for the panel.
